ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF(SBQQ__Quote__r.NATT_Migrated_Ordered__c, IF(SBQQ__Quote__r.NATT_RSD_Changed__c, AND(ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c, "Quote"), SBQQ__OriginalPrice__c <> NATT_RSD_Original_Price__c), false), AND(ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c, "Quote"), SBQQ__OriginalPrice__c <> NATT_RSD_Original_Price__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You may not add a requested ship date from different pricing periods.
